subject: Technician did not show for appointment
description: I had a confirmed appointment for May 18th between 10am and 2pm. The technician never arrived and I took the day off work.

subject: Account locked after password reset
description: After resetting my password I am now getting an account locked message and cannot log in at all.

subject: Smart TV remote not pairing
description: The replacement remote control shipped with my TV does not pair despite following all steps in the manual.

subject: Subscription not cancelled after request
description: I submitted a cancellation request on April 30th but was charged again on May 1st. The subscription is still active.

subject: Wrong colour item shipped
description: I ordered the blue model SKU BL-4421 but received the red model. I need an exchange or full refund.

subject: Office internet down for 48 hours
description: Our office connection has been completely down since Monday morning affecting all 20 staff members. This is urgent.

subject: Rude support agent interaction
description: The support agent I spoke with on May 6th was dismissive and ended the chat without resolving my issue.

subject: Cannot update profile email
description: The profile settings page throws a 500 error every time I submit a new email address.

subject: WiFi router dead on arrival
description: The router I received does not power on despite trying multiple outlets and cables. This is clearly defective hardware.

subject: Parcel lost in transit
description: My order #78923 shipped on April 25th has not arrived. The tracking page has shown In Transit for 10 days with no movement.

subject: Mobile app crashes on login
description: The mobile app crashes every time I try to log in after the latest update. I have tried reinstalling but the issue persists.

subject: Overcharged on April statement
description: My April bill shows a charge of $150 instead of the usual $99. Please investigate and issue a refund for the difference.
